armor_exploded_view.title: Armor Exploded View
armor_exploded_view.author: Dedou3D
armor_exploded_view.description: Toggle a configurable exploded view for humanoid armor parts.
armor_exploded_view.about: Armor Exploded View spreads recognized humanoid armor parts apart so each section is easier to inspect. Toggle it again to restore the model to its original positions.

hitbox_guard.title: Hitbox Guard
hitbox_guard.author: Dedou3D
hitbox_guard.description: Create a hitbox for your models.
hitbox_guard.about: Hitbox Guard creates a hidden `hitbox` folder with a hidden `hitbox` cube sized 14 x 32 x 14. It is made for entity workflows where a clean hitbox marker is required without manually building it every time.

name_guard.title: Name Guard
name_guard.author: Dedou3D
name_guard.description: Clean folder and cube names for safe ModelEngine exports.
name_guard.about:
Name Guard cleans folder and cube names so your models export safely.

Before:
`Right Arm`
- `Cube`
- `Cube`

After:
`right_arm`
- `right_arm`
- `right_arm`
